problem.title: Why traditional development is killing businesses

cards.title: Agencies charge $50K for 6 months
cards.desc: You pay for account managers, design research, and endless meetings. The product ships half a year late — and the market has already moved on.

cards.title: Freelancers vanish after the deposit
cards.desc: Finding a reliable dev is a lottery. They resell your project, go dark for weeks, or ship code no one else can maintain.

cards.title: Non-technical founders get stuck
cards.desc: You can't validate your own hypothesis. Every change is 'let me ask the dev tomorrow.' Your business moves at the speed of the slowest link.

solution.title: AI doesn't replace developers — it turns one dev into ten
solution.p1: We combine Claude Code, Cursor, GPT-5, n8n, Supabase, and battle-tested building blocks. What used to take a month takes a day. What cost $20K now costs $2K.
solution.p2: This isn't 'slop generated by AI.' It's engineering discipline with AI acceleration: architecture, tests, deployment, monitoring. Just 10x faster.
bullets: SaaS MVP — idea to shipped product in 2-4 weeks
Automations — n8n, Zapier, Make + custom scripts
AI agents — Claude/GPT instead of support, sales, research teams
Integrations — glue anything to anything via API
You own the code from day one. Zero vendor lock-in.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: Transparent at every step. You see progress weekly instead of waiting for a 'big reveal' in six months.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.desc: 30 minutes, free. We explore the idea, goals, constraints. We tell you honestly if we're a fit.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.desc: Scope, milestones, timeline — fixed. You know what you get and when. No mid-project scope creep.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Weekly demos. You test a live product, give feedback, we iterate. No surprises at the end.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Deploy on your infrastructure or ours. Domain, SSL, monitoring, first real users.

steps.title: Scale & Support
steps.desc: 2 weeks of support included. Then monthly retainer or handover to your team. Your call.

proof.title: Not NDA-locked client cases. Our own SaaS — try them yourself.
proof.subtitle: We built NLO Ecosystem as proof that Vibe Coding works. Six SaaS products, shipped by one person in a year. All live, all working, all with real users.

ecosystem.title: Need more than just dev?
ecosystem.subtitle: NLO Coding is part of a six-product ecosystem. Strategy, brand, content, finance — all under one roof. Engage us for dev, and you get access to everything.

founder.title: Oleksii — Brand Exorcist
founder.subtitle: 12+ years in marketing, sales, and consulting. 200+ one-on-one consultations, 95% satisfied clients. Author of the Bottleneck methodology. Founder of Sales Titans and NLO Ecosystem — 5 AI-powered SaaS shipped via Vibe Coding.
founder.p: I'm a business architect and I work as a partner, not a contractor. I write the code myself, coordinate AI agents, run every project personally. Because I've refunded enough client money after unreliable devs disappeared mid-project.

items.a: Depends on scope — from $2K for a simple automation to $15K+ for a full SaaS. We'll discuss budget on the Discovery Call and agree on a package that actually solves your problem. No hidden fees.
MVP — 2-4 weeks. Automation — 1-2 weeks. AI agent — from 3 days to 2 weeks. Custom integrations — depends on complexity. Exact timeline fixed in the proposal.
Yes, standard practice. Send us your template or we'll use ours.

items.q: Who owns the code after delivery?
items.a: You. Always. Code is transferred to your GitHub/GitLab. No license restrictions. You can continue with another team if you want.
Yes. 2 weeks free in every package. After that — monthly retainer (bug fixes + minor features) or full handover to your team.

items.q: What stack do you work with?
items.a: Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Postgres, Vercel — primary. Python for ML/data. Claude/OpenAI API, n8n, Zapier, Make for automations. We pick the stack for the task, not the other way around.

meta.title: SaaS MVP in 2-4 weeks — NLO Coding
meta.description: Idea to shipped product in a month. Next.js + Supabase + Stripe + Claude API. You own the code from day one.

hero.title: Ship an MVP in 2-4 weeks
hero.subtitle: For founders who want to validate a hypothesis, not wait quarters. Full cycle: auth, payments, deploy — and first real users by end of month.

pains.title: Investors want a live product
pains.desc: Slide decks don't work anymore. Show working software — raise the round. Show Figma — no.

pains.title: A team shouldn't cost like a mortgage
pains.desc: At hypothesis stage you can't afford $30K/mo on senior devs. But $0 isn't an option either.

pains.title: Time to first feedback is critical
pains.desc: The longer you're without real users, the higher the chance you're building the wrong thing. MVP isn't 'better later.' It's 'needed yesterday.'

included: UI design in Figma + design system

timeline.title: Week 1
timeline.desc: Discovery deep-dive, architecture, wireframes, design system, scope lock.

timeline.title: Week 2-3
timeline.desc: Core build: auth, DB, key features, payments. Weekly demos.

timeline.title: Week 4
timeline.desc: Polish, tests, deploy, monitoring, first users. Handover.

proof.desc: Full SaaS for AI-driven marketing strategies. 15-section documents, 7-phase dialogue, auth, subscription, export. Idea to launch — 3 weeks.

faq.q: What if I don't know exactly what I want yet?
faq.a: That's normal. The Discovery Call is literally for this. 30 minutes to extract the essence, formulate the MVP scope, and tell you honestly whether to start or spend another week thinking.

faq.q: What if I need mobile apps?
faq.a: A PWA (installable web app) is part of the standard MVP. Native iOS/Android — separate phase after market validation.

faq.q: How do we measure MVP success?
faq.a: Discovery Call — we agree on metrics before start: first 10 paying users, N MAU, hypothesis validation, etc. It's not 'a product,' it's 'a product that answers a question.'

faq.q: What if we need to change things along the way?
faq.a: Scope is fixed — but within scope, you control priorities weekly. If you need something outside scope, we add it to Phase 2 (post-MVP) or discuss separately.

meta.title: Business Process Automation — NLO Coding
meta.description: CRM, ETL, workflows. Free your team from repetitive work via n8n, Zapier, Make + custom scripts.

hero.title: Automate the grind
hero.titleAccent: and give your team back time
hero.subtitle: If your team copies data between spreadsheets, we'll kill it. CRM, ETL, workflows, reports, cross-tool integrations. Your team gets to do revenue-generating work instead of busywork.

pains.title: Your team wastes hours copying data
pains.desc: Excel → CRM → Email → Excel again. Errors, delays, burnout. One day of automation = weeks saved per year.

pains.title: Tools don't talk to each other
pains.desc: Google Sheets, Notion, CRM, accounting, email — each lives alone. Data gets duplicated, sync is manual.

pains.title: Reports take a week; you needed them yesterday
pains.desc: Leadership wants real-time metrics. Instead, an analyst cobbles together Excel for three days straight.

included: Process map + ROI calculation per process
Integrations with CRM, ERP, email, Slack, Notion
Team training: how to maintain when things break

timeline.title: Week 1
timeline.desc: Audit + process mapping. Top-3 by ROI selected. Scope + proposal.

timeline.title: Week 2
timeline.desc: Build workflows + test runs. Team training.

proof.desc: Automated daemon that watches ideas, GitHub issues, content calendar, and pushes tasks to AI agents. Runs 24/7, no human intervention. Built in 2 weeks.

faq.q: Do we need a tech team to maintain this?
faq.a: No. Automations on a no-code stack (n8n, Zapier) can be maintained by someone non-technical. We train one person on your team as the keymaster.
We design workflows modularly. 80% of changes — adding a step or tweaking a condition — take minutes. Complex changes: 30-min discovery + fix in 1-2 days.

faq.q: How much does automation typically save?
faq.a: Real client examples: 10-30 team hours per week. Plus fewer errors — hard to price directly, but critical.

faq.q: Can you integrate our legacy software?
faq.a: Almost always yes. If it has an API or CSV export, we can integrate. Even Excel files via OneDrive/Google Drive — works.

meta.title: AI Agents for business — NLO Coding
meta.description: Virtual employees on Claude/GPT: support, sales, research. Work 24/7, don't get tired, don't quit.

hero.title: A virtual employee
hero.subtitle: AI agents on Claude/GPT that handle customer support, qualify leads, do research, write content. Work 24/7, scale for free, never quit.

pains.title: Customer support is a bottleneck
pains.desc: Support writes the same answers 100 times a day. New customers wait hours. You lose leads.

pains.title: Lead qualification eats sales time
pains.desc: Sales spends 60% of time on people who won't buy. Instead of closing — disqualifying.

pains.title: Research takes weeks
pains.desc: Competitive analysis, prospecting, hypothesis validation — manual work that should be automatic.

included: Discovery: which tasks you're ready to delegate to AI
Knowledge base: your data, FAQ, policies
Integrations: CRM, email, Slack, WhatsApp, website
Analytics: conversation count, CSAT, escalation rate
2 weeks of support with daily monitoring

timeline.title: Week 1
timeline.desc: Discovery + agent design. Knowledge base structure. Prototype test.

timeline.title: Week 2
timeline.desc: Build + soft-launch on 5-10% of traffic. Daily review of responses.

timeline.title: Week 3
timeline.desc: Rollout to 100%. Fine-tune on real conversations. Handover.

proof.desc: Agents that write scripts, brainstorm ideas, publish posts for 9+ platforms. One call — 30 ready-to-publish content pieces. Serves 6 clients in parallel without coordination.

faq.q: What if the AI says something wrong?
faq.a: Human-in-the-loop. For complex or sensitive topics, the agent escalates to a human. Plus we monitor 100% of responses in week one, then a sample. Errors fixed immediately.

faq.q: How much knowledge can an agent handle?
faq.a: RAG architecture supports thousands of documents. We design embedding + retrieval so the agent always pulls current information.

faq.q: Does the agent respond in my brand voice?
faq.a: Yes. We run voice extraction from your existing materials (emails, support tickets, blog). The agent writes like you, not like ChatGPT.
Depends on volume. Claude/OpenAI API — $50-500/mo depending on traffic. Hosting — $20-50/mo. Plus our monitoring/improvement retainer if needed.

meta.title: About NLO Coding
meta.description: NLO Coding is part of the NLO Ecosystem — a delivery service for SaaS, automations, and AI agents.

hero.title: NLO Coding isn't an agency.
hero.titleAccent: It's proof that Vibe Coding works.
hero.subtitle: We build the NLO Ecosystem — six SaaS products shipped by one person with AI in a year. Now we apply the same approach to client projects.

philosophy.title: Next Level Ownership
philosophy.p1: NLO stands for Next Level Ownership — the next tier of owning your own life. We believe business should serve the human, not the other way around.
philosophy.p2: So we don't drag projects for years, don't sell a minimal-output retainer, don't hide code behind vendor lock-in. Fast, transparent, code is yours — and you own your time.
philosophy.p3: Vibe Coding is our tool, not our ideology. AI accelerates where it makes sense: code gen, refactoring, research, tests. But architecture, decisions, and critical paths — humans with taste.

founder.title: Oleksii Nikolaichuk
founder.p1: 12+ years of journey: sales rep → marketer → C-level (CMO, COO, R&D director) → own consultancy Bottle Neck → Sales Titans (sales team as a service) → Brand Exorcist (personal consulting practice). 200+ one-on-one consultations, 95% satisfied clients.
founder.p2: During COVID built 20-30+ websites with no programmers and mastered 80+ no-code tools. Author of the Bottleneck methodology (business bottleneck diagnosis) and the signature strategic session — 6 hours of work replacing months with an agency.
founder.p3: In 2024 started experimenting with AI-accelerated development — n8n → Claude Code → Vibe Coding. In 2 months shipped 5 SaaS products in the NLO Ecosystem. NLO Coding is the natural extension: apply the same approach to client work. I write the code myself, run projects as a partner. Currently based in Setúbal, Portugal.
